title: Battlegrounds Mobile India Series/2021

{{DISPLAYTITLE: Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2021}} {{BGMI Esports Navbox}} {{Tabs static |link1=Battlegrounds_Mobile_India_Series/2021|name1=Overview |link2=Battlegrounds_Mobile_India_Series/2021/Statistics|name2=Statistics }} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=2 |name=Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2021 |tickername=BGIS 2021 |shortname=2021 |image=Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2021 lightmode.png |imagedark=Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2021 darkmode.png |type=Online |team_number=16 |icon=Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2021 lightmode.png |icondarkmode=Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2021 darkmode.png |series=Battlegrounds Mobile India Series|abbreviation=BGIS |organizer=KRAFTON |organizer-link=https://www.krafton.com/en/ |organizer2=Tesseract Esports |organizer2-link=https://www.tesseractesports.com/ |sponsor=[https://www.iqoo.com/ iQOO] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=1,00,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2022-01-13 |edate=2022-01-16 |twitter= |discord=p2U2ebfHJC |instagram=battlegroundsmobilein_official |web=https://esports-battlegroundsmobileindia.com/ |facebook=BattlegroundsMobileIN |youtube=channel/UCe31NPEeRGO0hcznx6Tdb-g |loco=streamers/BATTLEGROUNDS_MOBILE_INDIA |next=Battlegrounds_Mobile_India_Series/2023{{!}}2023 }} '''Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2021''' or '''BGIS 2021''' is the first edition of ''[[Battlegrounds Mobile India Series|Battlegrounds Mobile India Series (BGIS)]]''. The tournament has been organized by '''[https://www.krafton.com/en/ KRAFTON]''' and is sponsored by '''[https://www.iqoo.com/ iQOO]''' and features a total prize pool of ₹1,00,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |b1=AnkiiiBOT|b1name=|b1flag=in |b2=Ocean |b2link=Ocean (Caster) |b3=Mazy }} {{box|break|padding=2em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=English Commentator |b1=Spero|b1name=Piyush Bathla|b1flag=in |b2=fLoki|b2name=Heeraka Thakor|b2flag=in |b3=Experiment }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2021:''' 4th December 2021 to 16th January 2022'' Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]] and [[Sanhok]] * '''''In-game Qualifiers:''' 4th December 2021 to 8th December 2021'' ** Open for all ** In-game qualifiers will be held to determine the contenders for the online qualifiers. ** Every registered squad will be required to play 15 matches, out of which 10 best games will be taken into consideration for qualification. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|''Top 1024 teams}} advance to '''''Online-Qualifiers''''' * '''''Online-Qualifiers:''' 16th December 2021 to 30th December 2021'' ** '''''1024 Teams''''' ** The Online-Qualifiers qualifiers have been divided into three rounds (Round 1, 2 and 3) ** 32 teams will be invited for Round 3. ** 2 matches will be played in Round 1 & 2 and multiple teams will be eliminated with each round. ** 3 matches will be played in Round 3 and multiple teams will be eliminated. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|''64 teams}} advance to '''''Quarter-Finals''''' * '''''Quarter-Finals:''' 2nd January 2022 to 5th January 2022'' ** '''''64 Teams''''' ** These 64 teams will be divided into 4 groups ** Each group will play a total of 6 matches ** Top 6 teams from each group will qualify for the '''''Semi-Finals'''''. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|''24 teams}} advance to '''''Semi-Finals''''' * '''''Semi-Finals:''' 7th January 2022 to 10th January 2022'' ** '''''24 Teams''''' ** These 24 teams will be divided into 3 groups ** The groups will face off against each other in a Round-Robin format. ** Each group will play a total of 8 Round Robins. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|''16 teams}} advance to '''''Grand-Finals''''' * '''''Grand Finals:''' 13th January 2022 to 16th January 2022'' ** '''''16 Teams''''' ** 24 matches to be played over a period of 4 days to determine the winner. ====Allocations==== * {{Bgcolortext|up|'''''Winner'''''}} qualified for '''[[PUBG_Mobile_Global_Championship/2021|PMGC 2021 - Grand Finals]]''' ''*In order to compete in the '''PMGC 2021 - Grand Finals''', teams needed to submit travel documents by January 16th, 2022.
As a result, '''[[GodLike Esports]]''' secures the spot as the team with the highest rank and holds all the travel requirements. {{cite web|title=👏Please welcome GodLike Esports as the final team to compete at the PMGC Grand Finals 2021🔥!|author=PUBG Mobile Esports|url=https://www.facebook.com/PUBGMESPORTSOFFICIAL/posts/726784275394619}} ====Points Distribution==== {{PUBGM 2021 Points System|killterm=finish}} ===Prize Pool=== ₹1,00,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( ≃ $134,310 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams as seen below:
₹3,00,000‬ {{Abbr/INR}} ( ≃ $4,024 {{Abbr/USD}} ) as Special Category Rewards. {{box|start team|padding=2em}} {{prize pool start|localcurrency=inr|points=seed}} {{prize pool slot
